name: visualization
description: D3.js-based data visualization for legal/law data - graphs, timelines, trees, charts, calendars, flowcharts, grids, kanban boards, and maps

skills.name: visualize-graph
skills.description: Network graphs, citation networks, document relationships (D3 force layout)

skills.name: visualize-timeline
skills.description: Temporal data, event sequences, case histories (D3 time scale)

skills.name: visualize-tree
skills.description: Hierarchical data, document structures, folder hierarchies (D3 hierarchy)

skills.name: visualize-chart
skills.description: Bar, line, area, pie charts for statistics and comparisons (D3)

skills.name: visualize-calendar
skills.description: Calendar heatmaps for activity over time (D3)

skills.name: visualize-flowchart
skills.description: Process diagrams, workflows, decision trees (D3 directed graph)

skills.name: visualize-grid
skills.description: Data tables with sorting, filtering, pagination (AG Grid)

skills.name: visualize-kanban
skills.description: Workflow boards, task stages, status columns (CSS layout)
